headline: $10.42 Bn Fleet Telematics Market by Vehicle Type, Package Type, Vendor Type, Solution Type, and Region - Global Forecast to 2032
summary: The fleet telematics market is set to expand from USD 10.42 billion in 2025 to USD 21.95 billion by 2032, at an 11.2% CAGR. There's progressive adoption of advanced telematics in commercial vehicles for deeper operational intelligence and efficiency. The aftermarket dominates, connecting multi-brand fleets through retrofit solutions and OEM data integration. headline: T-Mobile Joins Rivals On Satellite Venture With Shares Below Targets
summary: T-Mobile US (NasdaqGS:TMUS) is joining AT&T and Verizon in a proposed joint venture focused on satellite based, direct to device mobile connectivity across the United States. The three carriers plan to pool network and spectrum resources to reduce mobile dead zones and support emergency communications coverage. The collaboration is intended to speed up integration of satellite services into everyday mobile usage and broaden coverage beyond traditional towers. T-Mobile US, listed as...

headline: As “Trumpflation” Threatens the AI-driven Bull Market, a Sub-$50 Ultra-Safe Income Gem Stands Ready
summary: With the Consumer Price Index climbing from 325.252 in January 2026 to 333.020 in April 2026, the “Trumpflation” narrative is now visible in the data, and a central bank that may be forced back into a hiking posture is the kind of cocktail that turns AI-led euphoria into AI-led indigestion.
